creator: gedge@yadn.org
text:
edwin@FreeBSD.org said
		(on Sun, Nov 08, 2009 at 08:49:20PM +0000):
> Synopsis: net-im/pidgin-msn-pecan won't compile

I, too, get this error when making this port.
However, if I subsequently type:

	# cd ${WRKDIRPREFIX}/usr/ports/net-im/pidgin-msn-pecan/work/msn-pecan-0.1.0-rc1
	# gmake
	[...]
	# cd -
	# make
	[...]
	# make deinstall reinstall

then all is well.

-- 
Geraint A. Edwards (aka "Gedge")
gedge@yadn.org
